title: Deploy and manage apps on Azure Container Apps
summary: Learn how to deploy, manage, and scale containerized applications on Azure Container Apps.

sections.title: Deploy and manage apps on Azure Container Apps
sections.summary: Learn how to deploy, manage, and scale containerized applications on Azure Container Apps.

lessons.title: Deploy containers to Azure Container Apps
lessons.content_md:
Create and manage container deployments in Azure Container Apps. Work with environments, runtime configuration, registry authentication, and deployment verification techniques.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/deploy-containers-azure-container-apps/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Deploy containers to Azure Container Apps

lessons.title: Manage containers in Azure Container Apps
lessons.content_md:
Manage container apps across the day-two lifecycle. Update images, manage revisions, diagnose failing deployments, tune resources and scaling, and troubleshoot with logs and health probes.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-containers-azure-container-apps/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage containers in Azure Container Apps

lessons.title: Scale containers in Azure Container Apps
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to configure automatic horizontal scaling for containerized applications in Azure Container Apps using HTTP rules, KEDA scalers, and traffic management.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/scale-containers-azure-container-apps/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Scale containers in Azure Container Apps

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Deploy and manage apps on Azure Container Apps
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Deploy and manage apps on Azure Container Apps**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
